name: Isocyanate spray foam exposure at work - what are my rights in Idaho?

mainEntity.name: Isocyanate spray foam exposure at work - what are my rights in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.description: **File comp for respiratory/cancer risks; OSHA mandates warnings/PPE.** Report hazard[1][8]. **Key factors:** Prove levels exceeded safe[2]. **Practical guidance:** Get lung tests, safety sheets. Attorney for long-term monitoring. **Known toxic; claim viable.**
